title: Within-Stint Pairwise Ranker Plus AUC-Safe Blend
rationale: ROC AUC rewards ordering. In each driver-race-stint, the few imminent-stop laps should outrank the rest; pairwise ranking can learn that local ordering better than plain log-loss.
implementation_hint: Train an `XGBRanker` or equivalent with `qid=(Race,Year,Driver,Stint)` or `(Race,Year,Driver)`, keeping only groups that contain both positive and negative rows. Use the ranker score as an extra feature or blend by OOF rank averaging/logit averaging with the classifier. Keep the ensemble simple and strictly OOF to avoid fragile stacked meta-models.
expected_effect: Sharper separation among ambiguous pre-stop laps, improving AUC without requiring perfectly calibrated probabilities.
risk: Many groups are tiny and sparse; careless CV/stacking can create misleading gains.
